speaker: rep
text: Hey Mike, good to see you again. Excited to walk you through the platform today.

speaker: prospect
text: Thanks. I've got my team lead Jennifer here too. She'll be evaluating the technical side.

speaker: rep
text: Great, hi Jennifer. So let me just jump right into the demo. First, you'll see the dashboard here which shows all your sequence performance metrics and then over here we have the contact management section and this is where the AI personalization engine lives and you can also see the analytics tab which gives you real-time reporting and there's also the integration settings panel.

speaker: prospect
text: Can we slow down? I'd like to see the AI personalization piece specifically.

speaker: rep
text: Absolutely. So here's how it works — I'll pull up a sample prospect.

speaker: prospect
text: Is this using real data or test data?

speaker: rep
text: This is a sandbox with, um, like, sample data. But it works exactly the same way with real prospects.

speaker: prospect
text: Okay, go ahead.

speaker: rep
text: So I select a prospect and click 'Generate Personalized Intro.' The AI pulls data from their LinkedIn, recent company news, and shared connections.

speaker: prospect
text: How long does that take?

speaker: rep
text: Usually about 3-5 seconds. Here we go — you can see it generated three variants.

speaker: prospect
text: Those actually look pretty good. Jennifer, what do you think?

speaker: prospect
text: The quality is decent. How does it handle industries it's less familiar with?

speaker: rep
text: So basically the AI model is trained on millions of sales interactions and it covers virtually every industry and it also learns from your team's best-performing messages over time so it gets better and better and we also have industry-specific templates and custom training options and a feedback loop system.

speaker: prospect
text: Does it integrate with our existing email templates in HubSpot?

speaker: rep
text: Yes, you can import HubSpot templates directly. Let me show you that.

speaker: prospect
text: What about A/B testing? Can we test AI-generated vs. our existing templates?

speaker: rep
text: Definitely. There's a built-in A/B testing module. You set the split ratio and it tracks open rates, reply rates, and meeting booked rates.

speaker: prospect
text: That's useful. What about compliance? We're in financial services.

speaker: rep
text: Oh yeah, so, like, we have, you know, compliance features. There's a review workflow.

speaker: prospect
text: Can you be more specific? We need FINRA-compliant archiving.

speaker: rep
text: We archive all outbound communications and provide audit trails. I'd need to check on FINRA-specific certification though.

speaker: prospect
text: That's a dealbreaker if you can't do FINRA. Can you get back to us on that?

speaker: rep
text: Absolutely. I'll have our compliance team send over documentation by end of week.

speaker: prospect
text: Okay. Assuming that checks out, what does onboarding look like?

speaker: rep
text: We do a 2-week guided onboarding. Dedicated CSM, training sessions for your team, and help migrating your existing sequences.

speaker: prospect
text: Sounds good. Get us that FINRA info and we'll schedule a follow-up with our compliance officer.
